title: Junior Frontend Developer at Microsoft India

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Microsoft India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Microsoft India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Microsoft India:
Microsoft India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microsoft India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
